coordination_skills: name landmarks and dead ends in messages
avoid duplicate scouting of already-known branches
share secret-door and trap information before movement
metadata.tier_test_focus: Minimal single-agent probe for recognizing the shared map memory signal without extra branches.

entry_probe.name: Entry Probe
entry_probe.description: A compact start area that exposes the first shared map memory choice immediately.

axis_cell.name: Axis Cell
axis_cell.description: Small objective cell focused on shared map memory without extra branches.

scripts.lite_design_note: A secret-panel mazelet: one objective room, one optional shortcut, one decoy enemy, and a small lower route.

achievements.title: Pico Axis Probe
achievements.description: Make progress in the pico Glass Maze variant while preserving the shared map memory signal.
